title: Retrieval trace bundle exporter (folded WP-1-Retrieval-Trace-Bundle-Export)
goal: Provide a dedicated exporter that takes a retrieval trace_id and emits a redacted-by-default bundle containing QueryPlan + RetrievalTrace + budgets + cache markers + selected spans + referenced artifacts. Folded from WP-1-Retrieval-Trace-Bundle-Export. Makes retrieval issues debuggable, explainable, and shareable without leaking sensitive payloads.
expected_diff_shape: New module src/backend/handshake_core/src/memory/trace_export.rs (RetrievalTraceExporter + TraceBundle + RedactionPolicy + ExportFormat types) + Tauri IPC `kernel.memory_trace.export`. Tests src/backend/handshake_core/tests/trace_export_tests.rs.
unblock_conditions: MT-144 (CapsuleInjector flight-recorder events provide the trace_id surface), MT-161 (DegradationReport included in bundle), MT-164 (RetrievalMode routing recorded in bundle).
implementation_notes: Per WP-1-Retrieval-Trace-Bundle-Export preserved_intent. TraceBundle shape: `{ trace_id: Uuid, query_plan: QueryPlan, retrieval_trace: RetrievalTrace, budgets: MemoryPackBudgets, cache_markers: CacheMarkers, retrieval_mode: RetrievalMode, degradation_report: DegradationReport, selected_spans: Vec<SpanRef>, referenced_artifacts: Vec<ArtifactRef>, redactions_applied: Vec<RedactionRecord>, exported_at_utc, exporter_version: String }`. RedactionPolicy: `{ redact_pii: bool (default true), redact_credentials: bool (default true), redact_full_item_text: bool (default false), allowlist_artifact_kinds: Vec<String> }`. ExportFormat: `Json`, `JsonPretty`, `Tarball (includes referenced artifacts as separate files)`. RetrievalTraceExporter: `pub fn export(trace_id: Uuid, policy: &RedactionPolicy, format: ExportFormat) -> Result<ExportedBundle, ExportError>`. Redaction MUST be a pre-step: scan every text field through the same PII+credential scanner used by AC-DISTILL-CONTENT-REVIEW (regex + NER); failures redact to '[REDACTED]' and record in redactions_applied. IPC: `kernel.memory_trace.export(trace_id, policy, format) -> ExportedBundle`. Tests: bundle round-trips through serde; redaction policy default-on for PII + credentials; redactions_applied lists every redacted span; export to Tarball includes referenced artifacts as separate files; export of unknown trace_id returns typed ExportError.
risk_if_missed: Without trace export retrieval issues become impossible to debug or share; the operator has no shareable evidence bundle for support cases.
validator_focus: Redaction is default-on for PII + credentials; redaction record is non-optional; bundle round-trips deterministically.

minimum_controls: Redaction is default-on for PII + credentials; opt-out requires explicit policy field.
redactions_applied lists every redaction so reviewers can see what was hidden.
Tarball format includes referenced artifacts as separate files so the bundle is self-contained.
